package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for transaction_helper_outside_repository_or_uow_package: Transaction helpers buried in handlers or services instead of a repository or unit-of-work package.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule208NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule208NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule208NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario208Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule208NegativeService, input Rule208NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
